items.title: Schools close as more than half of France under red heat alerts
items.summary: The health minister warns many citizens "will suffer", with temperatures set to peak on Monday.

items.title: UK Startup is Making Electricity From Bacteria in the Soil – Maybe Your Garden Will Power Your Home Some Day
items.summary: British startup Bactery says its battery, powered by bacteria, uses nature’s microbes to generate an unending trickle of power—and by stringing the prototypes together they can generate a stream. Bact…
